findings.evidence: New theorem lines 38-40 expose both `hX_meas` and `hTail`; `TauCeti/Probability/Process/Tail.lean:128-131` provides `tailProcess_le_ambient`, deriving the same sub-σ-algebra proof from coordinate measurability.
findings.fix: Remove `hTail` from the theorem signature and call `directingMeasure_ae_eq_condExp (tailProcess_le_ambient 0 (fun k _ => hX_meas k)) (hX_meas 0) hB` in the proof.
findings.issue: `Contractable.directingMeasure_ae_eq_condExp_coord` requires callers to supply `hTail : tailProcess X ≤ inferInstance` even though the immediately preceding `hX_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (X n)` already determines this proof.

summary: The new bridge lemma exposes an unnecessary hypothesis in its public signature; the rest of the surface is minimal and uses existing characteristic API without exposing bodies.
